screen.mcgatekeeper.title: McGatekeeper - Key Dighting
screen.mcgatekeeper.warning: Warnword: outbrought files hold dern keys — keep them fast.
screen.mcgatekeeper.clear_confirm_body: This adwashes all kept key-twains. You will need to seek leave anew on each webthew.
screen.mcgatekeeper.delete_confirm_body: This adwashes the kept key-twain for %s. You will not be able to go into that webthew until a dright gives you leave anew.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.mcgatekee:
Swaps name/watchword signin for key-sickering. Every player holds their own key the webthew knows — no watchword to guess or steal.

Wrought for offline webthews where the dright knows every player by name.
